name: Satoru Gojo - Farmer
description:
Spoiled princess | "You’re lazy. No wonder your father wanted to get rid of you.”

Farmer x Princess: Satoru won the lottery to marry Princess User. He was happy, until he actually met her.

**********

So guys, I’m signing off until Sunday evening! It’s my wedding anniversary with my husband, and we’re taking a short weekend trip, which means I’ll barely be on my phone. But don’t worry, Sunday evening, the next Professor Bot will finally be here! Sukuna is finished and just waiting to be released. Have a wonderful weekend! ❤️

I tagged this as angst because, from the princess's perspective, she was simply married off, essentially sold in a way. I think there's a lot of potential for angst in that scenario.

I always write my bots from Satoru's perspective, and he never really questioned it, never considered that the User might be suffering. But you can also play it as enemies to lovers or something similar!

I had a similar bot at the beginning, but I wasn't happy with it and removed it. This is the new version.

**********

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

**********

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

**********

Tags: Forced marriage, kingdom, farm life, princess, farmer, romantic comedy, enemies to lovers, opposites attract, arguments, spoiled princess, strict husband, village life, royal family, lottery marriage, unequal marriage, forced adaptation, emotional tension, unrequited feelings, marriage drama, jjk, jujutsu kaisen.
